pages.homepage_text:
Brightsmile Dental Clinic is a dental clinic in Austin, TX. Founded 2012. We're a team of 13.
Why Austin chooses us
For more than 14 years Brightsmile Dental Clinic has served Austin and the surrounding TX region with dependable, locally-operated dental clinic work. Our team of 13 knows the neighborhoods, the buildings, and the seasonal rhythms that shape what our clients actually need — the kind of practical knowledge you only build by showing up in the same zip codes year after year.
Who we serve
We work with homeowners, small businesses, and repeat commercial accounts across Austin. Whether you've worked with a dental clinic before or this is your first project, we walk every new client through the process step by step: what to expect, what options exist at your price point, and what we'd recommend if the job were on our own property. No hard sell, no upsell theatre, no contracts you can't cancel.
What we do
Our core offerings cover general dentistry, invisalign, teeth whitening, and pediatric dentistry. Every engagement starts with a site walkthrough and a written scope so there are no surprises on invoice day.
- General dentistry
- Invisalign
- Teeth whitening
- Pediatric dentistry
Credentials & proof
Brightsmile Dental Clinic is fully insured and holds every permit and certification the state of TX requires for our trade. Our team of 13 collectively brings decades of hands-on experience, and we publish before-and-after galleries, customer reviews, and project case studies so prospective clients can see the actual work — not just marketing renders.
Get in touch
Email: hello@example.test · Phone: (555) 555-0100
